description.unified: Deals damage to enemies within range and stuns them for [2sec->3 sec].

Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for 15 sec, dealing continuous Magic Damage. [Enemies with [Mark of Death] take 25% increased Magic Damage, and if recast within 15 sec, the effect is increased by 20%.->If recast within 15 sec, the M.DEF reduction increases by 50% and stacks up to 5 times. (removed) M.DEF by 10%]. This [effect->M.DEF reduction increase effect] stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.

Deals Magic Damage per second to all enemies for [22 sec->12 sec], recovers HP equal to [50%->130%] of damage dealt, [ (added) and has a 10% chance to stun them for 0.6 sec]. During the duration, [all allies take 20% reduced Physical Damage->reduces M.DMG taken by 11% for 4 allies with the lowest M.DEF], and enemies [inflicted with->with] [Mark of Death] take additional Magic Damage equal to [81.4%->97.6%] of Attack Power.

Increases [all allies’ Physical Defense by 45(1+0.3Skill Level)->M.DEF of the ally with the lowest M.DEF by 101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))]. When taking [fatal damage->damage that would be fatal], enters [Coffin] state for 5 sec, restoring [197*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 153.7% ATK + 10% Max HP->197(1+0.3Skill Level)+153.7% of Attack Power + 6% of Max HP]. While in [Coffin] state, Attack Speed changes do not affect you, you are immune to all damage, and deal Magic Damage equal to 5% of Max HP [every 1 sec->per second] to nearby enemies.

dark.unified: Mana cost is [increased by 1000->increased by 2000], but pulls the target to [your vicinity with a 100% success rate->you].
[Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 7 sec->All allies additionally take 10% less Physical DMG].
When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for [1 sec->1.2 sec].

description.unified: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target’s CC Resist by [320->400] and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.
[Day of Ruin] increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target’s M.DEF by 3% for 5 sec each time damage is dealt. This effect can stack up to 10 times.
[Rest in Peace] [reduces all DMG taken by {0}% for 10 sec after use. Cooldown set to 40 sec->Sets cooldown to 45 sec, and after activation, reduces M.DMG taken by {0}% for 10 sec].

dark.unified: On hit, Attack and Healing are increased by 1%. This effect stacks up to [35->50] times.

description.unified: Deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power per second to nearby enemies, reduces their Attack by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to [100%->75%] of damage dealt. [ (added) The 4 allies with the highest Attack (excluding yourself) deal {2}% increased damage to non-hero enemies. This effect cannot be dispelled.]
